# David Blog - AI Knowledge Base

> A bilingual (English/Chinese) blog about technology, finance, design, and productivity.

## About

David is a developer based in Vancouver, Canada. The blog documents explorations in tech tools, financial products, and creative work — sharing discoveries, workflows, and honest evaluations.

## Content Areas

### Tools & Workflows
Hands-on reviews of software, CLI utilities, and productivity systems. Real-world testing with specific use cases, installation instructions, and honest pros/cons.

### Finance & Banking
Guides on Canadian and international banking products, credit card strategies, and financial tools. Focus on international students and new residents in Canada. Banks covered include HSBC, TD, BoA, Wells Fargo, and more.

### Design & Animation
Analysis of animation series, films, and visual media. Storytelling techniques, cultural context, and visual design assessment.

### Writing & Typography
Style guides for mixed-language (Chinese-English) writing. Spaces between text, punctuation usage, proper capitalization, and date/currency formatting.

### Projects
Documentation of personal software projects.

## Writing Principles

1. **Specificity over generality** — Real data, concrete examples, step-by-step details
2. **Data-driven analysis** — Claims supported by real-world testing
3. **Honest evaluation** — Both pros and cons presented
4. **Bilingual consideration** — English versions tend to be more comprehensive; translations preserve original tone

## Tags

Animation, CLI, Experience, Finance, Games, Info, LLM-free, Reprint, Screen, Thoughts, Tools, Translated, Writing, Workflow

## Technical Stack

- Astro (static site generator)
- Cloudflare Pages
- TypeScript, Markdown
- Tailwind CSS

## Site Structure

- `/posts/` — Blog posts (en/, zh/)
- `/tags/` — Posts by tag
- `/about/` — About page
- `/my-referral-codes/` — Financial referral codes
